concerns.text: FR-001 dataset (OpenNeuro ds0001171) shows 'NO verified source found' in research.md, but plan.md proceeds as if dataset will be available. This violates Constitution Principle II (Verified Accuracy) - plan cannot execute with unverified dataset.

Data model defines 'Classifier (1) → (1) Permutation Result' relationship, but plan.md does not explicitly reference storing permutation results as a distinct entity. Contract covers this via statistical_corrections, but plan should map to data model entity.
Contract requires 'participant_count' field in output schema, but plan.md does not explicitly describe how participant count is tracked or reported in pipeline steps.
